ui.portal_dialog_body: You've reached the portal. Switch scenes?
ui.command.move.name: Move
ui.command.move.tooltip: Order the unit to move to a target point, ignoring enemies on the way.
ui.command.stop.name: Stop
ui.command.hold_position.name: Hold Position
ui.command.hold_position.tooltip: Order the unit to remain in place and attack only enemies that come into range.
ui.command.attack.name: Attack
ui.command.attack.tooltip: Order the unit to attack a target, or to attack-move toward a point and engage any enemies encountered.
ui.command.attack_move.name: Attack-Move
ui.command.attack_move.tooltip: Move toward a point, attacking any enemies encountered along the way.
ui.command.patrol.name: Patrol
ui.command.patrol.tooltip: Order the unit to patrol between its current location and a target point.
